overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a third-person perspective walking through a commercial plaza in Night City at sunset. The camera follows various pedestrians before switching to follow MaxTac robotic security units, featuring futuristic architecture, palm trees, neon signage, and reflective water features.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza following pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in bright orange pants walking ahead of the camera

large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
wide open pedestrian concrete area with scattered papers
distant futuristic city buildings with lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide urban plaza at sunset, with tall palm trees silhouetted against an orange sky. The camera follows a pedestrian through the open concrete area, passing by a large digital billboard on the right while distant city lights twinkle in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with ground floor shops

events.description: moves from open plaza into covered commercial walkway along orange building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the crowded sidewalk past illuminated shop fronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians browsing shop windows along the building

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive orange facade and ground floor retail
illuminated store signs and neon advertisements
low concrete seating structures along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered commercial walkway along an orange building facade, where the crowd density increases significantly. Pedestrians browse shop windows with bright signage while the camera moves past concrete benches on the left, transitioning from open sky to a more enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with robotic security patrol

events.description: camera switches to following MaxTac robotic security agents instead of human pedestrians

agents.ego_description: following heavily armed robotic security units through the plaza

notable_agents.action: MaxTac robot standing guard with weapon raised
second robotic agent patrolling the plaza area

entered.detail: rectangular reflecting pools with calm water mirroring the sky
tall tower structure with multiple digital screens showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts dramatically to follow robotic MaxTac agents patrolling the central plaza. The camera circles around the mechanical units while revealing rectangular water features in the plaza center, with futuristic billboard towers visible against the orange dusk sky.

events.description: camera circles around the water features showing reflections of the orange sky

agents.ego_description: navigating around the perimeter of the reflecting pools

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of the reflecting pools, capturing the mirrored orange sunset in the water surface. The perspective shifts to show the open plaza extending toward the distant city skyline, with palm trees now centered in the frame and the digital billboard visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling urban plaza that transitions from an open sunset landscape into a crowded commercial corridor before returning to a wide view of the city skyline. It begins in a wide concrete area with palm trees silhouetted against an orange sky, following a pedestrian past a large digital billboard. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a covered walkway along an orange building facade, where the open sky is replaced by an enclosed corridor filled with dense crowds and bright shop signage. The perspective then pivots to circle robotic MaxTac agents patrolling the center of the plaza, revealing rectangular water features and towering futuristic billboards. Finally, the camera glides along the edge of these reflecting pools, capturing the mirrored sunset in the water before opening up to a distant view of the city skyline framed by palm trees.
